name: Performance Warmup — 10 min
description: A tight warmup to run before a gig, recital, lesson, or recording session. Tuner check, metronome pulse, one clean run of a familiar piece.

items.label: Tune (1 min)
items.instruction: Open the Tuner module. Verify every string / your voice / your reed is at pitch. Fix anything drifting.

items.label: Metronome pulse — 2 min at performance tempo
items.instruction: Open the Metronome. Set it to your performance tempo. Play a simple pattern (long tones, one scale, a warmup lick). Get your internal clock aligned with the performance tempo.

items.label: One clean run of your opening piece (7 min)
items.instruction: Play through the piece you're about to perform. Slow it slightly if needed to make sure it's clean. Do NOT drill problem spots now — trust that yesterday's work holds. This is a warmup, not a rescue.
